global.rationale: This is the first complete branch-aware baseline for the canonical package.
global.removal_gate: Raise this floor whenever the complete solver-free suite increases coverage.

targets.rationale: Every runtime compatibility acceptance decision must be exercised.
targets.removal_gate: Permanent safety target; do not lower.

targets.rationale: Every discriminated job transport decision must be exercised.
targets.removal_gate: Permanent safety target; do not lower.

targets.rationale: Every pre-side-effect structural rejection decision must be exercised.
targets.removal_gate: Permanent safety target; do not lower.

targets.rationale: Every canonical identity validation decision must be exercised.
targets.removal_gate: Permanent safety target; do not lower.

targets.rationale: The Windows lane cannot execute the POSIX directory fsync implementation branch.
targets.removal_gate: Run the same policy on a POSIX lane and require complete cross-platform branch coverage.

targets.rationale: Every public schema support decision must be exercised.
targets.removal_gate: Permanent safety target; do not lower.

targets.rationale: Every immutable tool specification conflict must fail closed under test.
targets.removal_gate: Permanent safety target; do not lower.

targets.rationale: The dependency-free status store must retain complete copy and update coverage.
targets.removal_gate: Permanent safety target; do not lower.
